result.stdout:
Description:
  Process templates with EzLocalKeyVault substitutions

Usage:
  ez-keyvault [options]

Options:
  -t, --template <template> (REQUIRED)  The template file to process (JSON format)
  -v, --vault <vault> (REQUIRED)        The key vault file containing secrets (JSON format)
  -o, --output <output>                 The output file path. If just a filename, writes to template directory. If full path, writes to that path. If omitted, outputs to console.
  --version                             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

  --version                             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information
